calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rachel Rosenfeld for Gable Payne, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the examiner's notes. It was noted that the probate referee reported a zero valuation for the quarry, limiting funds available within the estate. The court pointed out that it cannot order payment outside the estate but can approve fees and grant a lien. The court approved a lien with 5% interest to secure payment for counsel's extraordinary fees. The court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant under these terms.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Appearances: Rachel Rosenfeld appeared by zoom for Gable Payne.

Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that as of this morning her client signed the verification and that she plans to file a petition for final distribution today. Status on close of estate is continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Royalty Interests And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate And Heirs
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rachel Rosenfeld appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court noted that counsel has made significant progress on this, spoke of the notice issue to the LLC and stated that it left this on calendar to see if anyone would appear to object. The court also stated that it is prepared to grant the petition with respect to the royalty interest in section 1.4 of the purchase agreement, that it is not prepared to do anything else and that if counsel wants additional relief, it will need to continue the matter. In addition, the court informed counsel that she will need to lodge a proposed order today. Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that the quarry has not been mined and probably won't be for a very long time and asked the court if it is willing to order payments after the date of close of the estate. The court stated that it can only approve payments through the date of close. Mrs. Rosenfeld stated that she would like more time to notice Teichert. The Petition to Establish Estate's Claim of Ownership to Royalty Interests, etc., is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration currently set for October 30, 2023 is also continued to December 18, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Royalty Interests And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate And Heirs
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeff Carchidi, Esq., via Zoom, for interested parties.

The court confirms with counsel that he represents Lynn and Debra, who are children of the decedent. The court notes that petitioner's counsel nor the petitioner is present at today's hearing. At the court's query, Mr. Carchidi confirms having emailed petitioner's counsel regarding his intended appearance at todays' hearing.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is sufficient and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 28, 2019 is admitted to probate. Gable Payne is appointed as the Administration of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required/is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 6, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
